{{Infobox character
|nom=Bill
|apparition=Appears in book 1
|status=Unknown
}}

== Biography ==

Bill is a worker who takes instructions from a master to perform manual labor involving ladders, ropes, and chimney work.

== Relationships ==

'''[[Alice]]''' — enemy

'''[[Queen]]''' — enemy

'''[[White Rabbit]]''' — employment

''Evolution:''
* [[Queen]] — Enemy (ch.12)
* [[Alice]] — Enemy (ch.4)
* [[White Rabbit]] — Employment (ch.4)


[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Personnages du Tome 1]]
